title: Nursery Rhyme. CLXVII. Songs.
content:
As I was going along, long, long,
        A singing a comical song, song, song,
        The lane that I went was so long, long, long,
        And the song that I sung was as long, long, long,
        And so I went singing along.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CLXVII. Songs."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
